metadata.description: Curated community extensions from the Pi (pi-mono) ecosystem — Dimension's grandparent. Every entry is source-reviewed, MIT-licensed, pinned to a reviewed commit, and verified to load in OMP/Dimension (ACP-safe: the extension's job survives outside the TUI).

plugins.name: apply-patch-tool
plugins.description: Codex-style apply_patch tool with prompt guidance injection — structured multi-file patches as a first-class tool.

plugins.name: pi-web-access
plugins.description: Web search, URL fetching, GitHub repo cloning, PDF extraction, and YouTube understanding. Bring-your-own key: OpenAI, Brave, Parallel, Tavily, Exa, Perplexity, or Gemini.

plugins.name: pi-permission-system
plugins.description: Policy-based permission enforcement for agent tool calls — allow/deny/ask rules with tree-sitter-accurate bash command parsing.
